Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Order Relieving Petitoner From Provisions Of Government Code 945.4
Off Calendar Jun-09-2021 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Robert Burton, Esq. (415-392-8920; rburton@kurlanderburtonlaw.com) of Kurlander,Burton & Mack for Petitioner, James Allston.
Tom Lakritz, Esq. (415-554-3963; tom.lakritz@sfcityatty.org) Deputy City Attorney for Respondent, City and County of San Francisco.

ARGUED (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER JAMES ALLSTON's Petition For Order Relieving Petitoner From Provisions Of Government Code 945.4: taken under submission.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
